name: TestYannakakisPlus
cases: select count(yannakakis_t1.c) from yannakakis_t1 join yannakakis_t2 on yannakakis_t1.a = yannakakis_t2.a join yannakakis_t3 on yannakakis_t2.b = yannakakis_t3.b

select yannakakis_t1.a, sum(yannakakis_t3.b) from yannakakis_t1 join yannakakis_t2 on yannakakis_t1.a = yannakakis_t2.a join yannakakis_t3 on yannakakis_t2.b = yannakakis_t3.b group by yannakakis_t1.a order by yannakakis_t1.a

select yannakakis_t1.a, sum(yannakakis_t3.c) from yannakakis_t1 join yannakakis_t2 on yannakakis_t1.a = yannakakis_t2.a join yannakakis_t3 on yannakakis_t2.b = yannakakis_t3.b group by yannakakis_t1.a order by yannakakis_t1.a
